_note: Representative REQUEST body for creating an inline diff comment, assembled from documented parameters. Not exercised against a live GitLab instance.
_note_2: All three shas (base_sha/start_sha/head_sha) come from the MR's diff_refs field (GET .../merge_requests/:iid) at the time of commenting -- the caller must fetch and pin these before posting, unlike GitHub's single commit_id + line + side.
